agendaList.gateText: Log in to view your agenda as a staff member.

calendar.cancelConfirmMessage: The client will no longer see this time slot in the app. Confirm the cancellation?
calendar.emptyDay: No client appointments on this day.
calendar.intro: Days highlighted on the calendar have at least one client appointment scheduled.
calendar.selectDayHint: Tap a day on the calendar to list the client time slots.

detail.gateText: Sign in to manage your agenda.
detail.intro: Set the days and times when you accept client appointments at this establishment.
detail.savedMessage: Your availability at this location has been updated.
detail.scheduleIncompleteMessage: Select at least one day and set opening and closing times for each active day.

newBookingType.clientDescription: Choose this option to schedule an appointment slot for a client.
newBookingType.personalDescription: Choose this option to block a period of your agenda for a personal commitment.

personalCommitment.overlapMessage: The selected period overlaps with already confirmed bookings. Do you want to block it anyway?
personalCommitment.timeOrderError: The end time must be after the start time.

disponibilidadeList.gateText: Log in to manage your availability.

scheduleValidation.closedDay: The establishment is closed on {{weekday}}. Disable this day in your availability or ask the owner or manager to adjust the location's hours.
scheduleValidation.invalidTime: Check the hours on {{weekday}} (use HH:MM format).
scheduleValidation.outOfRange: On {{weekday}}, your availability ({{staffOpen}}–{{staffClose}}) must fit within the establishment's hours ({{estOpen}}–{{estClose}}).
